articles.title: Facing protests and new threats from Trump, is the Iranian regime on its last legs? - The Conversation
articles.snippet: Iran’s Islamic regime is once again faced with nationwide popular protests and a potential confrontation with Israel and the United States. Protesters have flooded Tehran and many other major cities in recent days, calling for the downfall of the regime. The regime severely cracked down on those pro

articles.title: Will the Regime in Iran Fall? History Offers Some Clues. - The Free Press
articles.snippet: Will the Regime in Iran Fall? Significant revolutions in world history all have had telltale signs, and we can see them in Iran, writes Simon Sebag Montefiore.
